meaning: adj.不毛的,没有收益的,非生产性的,徒然的,没有出产物的
examples: I've had a very unproductive day.
Research workers are well aware that much of their time and effort is unproductive.
If we weren't on our devices, we'd likely do something similarly unproductive.
It is antiquated, absurd, and not just unproductive but often counterproductive to limit your talent pool.
Faculty members, for example, still will emphasize unproductive research at the expense of instruction.
